titleStmt.title: SII 18.62: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 62. (B.K. No. 114 of 1933-34.) MŌṬĒBENNŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the temple of Mallikārjuna.

summary.p: This damaged inscription refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva and is dated in Śaka 973, Khara, Āśvayuja s11u. Wednesday. The tithi is lost. In Āśvayuja Śuddha-paksha, the week-day given, coincided with the tithis Tṛitīyā and Daśami, corresponding to A.D. 1051, September 11 and 18 respectively.

It states that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāvuṇḍarāya, the governor of Banavāsi Twelve-thousand, granted the village Nāgarapāḷ situated in Sattaḷige Seventy and some land for the maintenance of a maṭha and of the students studying therein and for the worship and offerings to the god (of the place). Lōkābharaṇa-paṇḍita of the Kāḷāmukha sect, the recipient of the gift, is highly praised. The nāḷgāvuṇḍa of Sattaḷige Seventy and the gāuṇḍa of Beṇṇevura are mentioned. The names of both of them are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . ma namasāśvatikānanda
sta ya vē © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā rājādhirāja paramēśvara pa
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō ttarābivṛddhipravardda
raṁbaraṁ salūttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi © samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā maṇḍaḷēśvara banavā
mahālakṣmīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ tyāgavinōdanāyadācārya nasahāyasauryaṁ gaṇḍara gaṇḍa gaṇḍabhēruṇḍa mūṟurāya
ṁkavriṣabhaśaṁkaraṁ ripunripabhayaṁkaraṁ kaliga birudarāditya pratyakṣa vikramādityaṁ siṣṭasanmāna
mastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāvuṇḍarāya sipanni rcchāsiramumanēkāya
ṣṭapratipāḷaneyindāḷuttamire . © śrīramaṇīyaṁ vākśrīramaṇīyaṁ samastanijabhuja vijaya
ramaṇīyaṁ dharitriyoḷ rāyanripaṁ © vṛtta © muḷisindaṁ rāyabhūpaṁ nijabhuja vijayōgrāsiyaṁ kirtto
ṟalamararaḷkāḍalāsāgajēṁdraṁ teḷaralbaḷkāḍa vanitu mahākṣōbha māytendoḍāvaṁ seḷavaṁ ni
ḷmīṟi mārkkoḷvanāvaṁ © maṇḍaḷikasārvabhauma maṇḍaḷikapraḷa
ri gaṇḍara gaṇḍa teyiṁ sāhasamaṁ
maṇḍaladoḷ . śrīvanitādhipana birudaradēva gaṇḍa dēva
© svasti samastavairimanneya lōkavikhyātaṁ sakaḷa kaḷādhara
śrī praṇamēśvaradēvapādapaṁkajabhramaranenipa śrī sattaḷige yeḻpattarkkaṁ nāḻgāvuṇḍugeyye © svasti samasta saṁ
panna rēkavākyarnnīticāṇakya beṇnevura
gāvuṇḍugeyye © sakavarṣa 973 neya kharasaṁvatsarada Āśvayuja suddha budhavāradandu © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāra
ṇa japasavūdhi hārādisaṁpannarvviśiṣṭajanaprasanna kuḷāṁbaradivākara
śrī lōkābharaṇapaṇditar © kanda © bhūbhuvana munī
ndrābharaṇarśśivapadārttharnnirnniktanarēṁdrābharaṇarssukavi bharaṇar . sārtthaka
bubhujanakella kūrttādaradiṁ sale vidyārtthijanādhāra © svasti śrīma nmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāvuṇḍarāya
ya kāḷāmukhāgragaṇyarappa śrīmallōkābharaṇa pūrvvaka diṁ ddharaṇaṁ māḍi beṇne
vūrada śrīmajjōgabēśvaramaṭha vidyārtthi tapōdhana doḷirppamāṇi yara śanāccādanakka
dēvara gaṁdhadhūpadīpannānanivēdyakkaṁ dēgulada khaṇḍa ḷige yeḻpattaṟa baḷiya nāgarapāḷaṁ biṭṭanadaṟa sīmā
Āgnēya nairityadoḷ beḷḷe nadoḷa
kṣi © kanda © parama kadēva
śāstrayuktar lōkābharaṇamunīṁdra © Intī dharmmamanāvanōrbbaṁ pratipāḷisidavaṁ vāraṇāsi
kurukṣētra prayāgeyargghyatīrtthaveṁba puṇyatīrtthagaḷoḷ sāsirvva pāragarappa brāhmaṇargge sāsirvvarnnaiṣṭhikatapōdhanarggaṁ
leya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ pañcaratnadiṁ kaṭṭisi yubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku . Idanaḷi dātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayāgeyargghya
tīrtthadoḷsāsirbba caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇa naḷida paṁcamahāpāta kanakku ©
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭivariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya tē kṛmi © bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarā
dibhi yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvā
nētānu bhāginaḻpārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ © na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhurddēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti
dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ kanda sthānapati gorava sthānada vidyārtthi tati sthānado gavanaṁ sthānamumarasugaḷiḻdu kaḷeyaluvē
ḻkuṁ © © ślōka © brahmā guṇa grāmā rājabhiḥ © purakkaṁ karmma
kallōjaṁ ©
Digital edition of SII 18.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
